default.error:
EndPointInternalError: The endpoint returned the HTTP status code 500. 

Response:
b'Virtuoso S1T00 Error SR171: Transaction timed out

SPARQL query:

                SELECT ?ps ?po WHERE {
                  ?s <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#featureClass> ?o .
                  FILTER ISIRI(?s)
                  
                  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?s), "(https?://[^/]+).*", "$1") AS ?ps)
                  BIND(IF(ISIRI(?o), REPLACE(STR(?o), "(https?://[^/]+).*", "$1"), "any") AS ?po)
                }
                LIMIT 1000
                OFFSET 5041000
                '
